mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescriptions (visit_id, doctor_id, patient_id, consultation_fee, medicine_amount, total_amount, status, created_at) VALUES (#{visitId}, #{doctorId}, #{patientId}, #{consultationFee}, #{medicineAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE prescriptions SET status = 'PAID' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'UNPAID'
